caption: A screen recording shows a video call interface featuring a man wearing a grey shirt and a dark baseball cap in the upper right corner. The main window displays a digital mind map or concept map with several nodes connected by lines. In the initial sequence, a few nodes are visible, including one showing a photo of a classroom with students and another labeled "blackboard hub learning". A small circular profile picture of a man is also present. As the sequence progresses, the map expands significantly, adding numerous new nodes and interconnecting lines. These new nodes include various icons and labels such as " blackboarding", "blackboarding", "blackboarding", and "blackboard hub". The top of the browser window shows multiple open tabs, including titles like "Truth & Learning by Systemic", "Elements by SystemicHub", "Future of Society by Systemic", "Insights introduction to Alumni", and "Rural Community Feed Spreading".
